LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL. MS. SKERSTON STATES THAT THE PARTIES ARE TRYING TO SETTLE THE MATTER AND THAT THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUESTING A SIXTY-DAY CONTINUANCE. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL IS CONTINUED TO JULY 16, 2021 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-16-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL UNDER CCP 664.6 & ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR WELLS FARGO BANK IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: LAURA REDING, CSR NO. 9711, EMAIL: LREDING@SFTC.ORG. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Vivian Lerche, Esq., Specially Appearing for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A's Motion To Vacate Dismissal:

Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'s unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal under CCP 664.6 & enter judgment pursuant to stipulation" is granted.

Counsel for Wells Fargo Bank is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR No. 9711, Email: lreding@sftc.org. =(302/RBU)

Motion To Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Continued To Jul-16-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Paula Skerston, Esq. for Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL.

The matter is called. Ms. Skerston states that the parties are trying to settle the matter and that the Plaintiff is requesting a sixty-day continuance.

The Court vacates its tentative ruling and grants Ms. Skerston's request. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal is continued to July 16, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
